cover_brand.hero_left_visual.summary: Brand-led cover with editable title and a controlled no-text visual background.

statement_plus_evidence.left_rule_panel.summary: One clear judgment with supporting evidence, using a strong rule and light visual texture.

evidence_board.source_table.summary: Source-grounded evidence page with editable rows, captions, and takeaway hierarchy.

comparison_matrix.two_column_delta.summary: Editable comparison page with two sides, delta markers, and explicit conclusion.

process_flow.horizontal_steps.summary: Horizontal service flow with editable steps and generated no-text process accents.

metric_panel.large_number_strip.summary: Editable benefit or KPI panel with large numbers, units, and supporting conditions.

risk_callout.qa_stack.summary: Risk, caveat, or FAQ page with clear conditions and action-safe wording.

action_roadmap.owner_timeline.summary: Editable action roadmap with timeline, owner, status, and next move.

closing_commitment.brand_tail.summary: Brand-tail closing page with editable closing statement and controlled background.

section_divider.hero_light.summary: Light breathing page that resets rhythm between dense sequences; no card grid.

section_divider.hero_dark.summary: Dark breathing page used as a deliberate act break, not as a repeated title slide.

image_story.text_image_7_5.imageContract: 16:10 or 4:3; align the image with body content, preserve a crop-safe focal point
image_story.text_image_7_5.summary: Asymmetric 7:5 story spread with editable text and one evidence-bearing image.

image_proof.uniform_grid.imageContract: All peers use one standard ratio and one crop policy; screenshots use contain when labels matter
image_proof.uniform_grid.summary: Uniform evidence wall for screenshots, field photos, or before/after states; captions are mandatory.

product_stage.full_bleed_safe.imageContract: 16:9 subject-first image with explicit desktop and mobile focal point
product_stage.full_bleed_safe.summary: Cinematic product or place stage with one visual protagonist and restrained editable copy.

data_hero.single_kpi.summary: One projection-scale metric with its meaning and source; not a collage of unrelated numbers.

native_chart.direct_label.summary: Editable PowerPoint chart with direct labels and one explicit conclusion.

editorial_quote.pull_quote.summary: Low-density editorial pause with a real quote or independently useful judgment.

timeline.vertical_kpi.summary: Vertical chronology plus one metric; avoids squeezing a long story into equal cards.

system_map.layered.summary: Editable system architecture or ecosystem map with a single reading direction.

source_colophon.editorial.summary: Editorial source colophon that keeps facts, interpretation, and future update triggers separate.
